overview: Optimize U provides hormone optimization therapy starting with comprehensive blood work and lab analysis. Treatment plans are customized based on results and delivered via home medication delivery, with options for in-person or telemedicine consultations.
highlights: In-house phlebotomy at all clinic locations
Home delivery of medications in discrete packaging
On-site recovery services (cryotherapy, infrared sauna, compression, peptides)
targetAudience: Adults experiencing age-related hormonal decline, weight-related concerns, or reduced sexual function and vitality.
